detail: Every email except MasterTemplate itself must be injected into MasterTemplate HTML via c:\Udvikling\analysis-tool\domains\Email\020_behaviors.jsonMAIN_CONTENTc:\Udvikling\analysis-tool\domains\Email\020_behaviors.json placeholder. GetTemplateByNameEnum() enforces this automatically.
rule: MasterTemplate wraps all other templates via c:\Udvikling\analysis-tool\domains\Email\020_behaviors.jsonMAIN_CONTENTc:\Udvikling\analysis-tool\domains\Email\020_behaviors.json

detail: Status progression: Importing→Queued→SendingToGateway→SentToGateway. SentToGateway→Delivered→Opened (from SendGrid webhook). DefaultNoChangeStatuses prevents downgrading from Delivered/Opened. Retry states: QueuedFirstRetry, SendingToGatewayFirstRetry, QueuedSecondRetry, SendingToGatewaySecondRetry.
rule: EmailMessage status lifecycle is forward-only except retries

detail: EmailAttachment.FileContent is VARBINARY(MAX). Unlike ProfileStorageFiles (Azure Blob), email attachments are stored directly in SQL. Implication: large attachments inflate DB size.
rule: Email attachments stored as binary in DB — not blob storage

detail: EmailMessage.TestMode=true sets SentToGatewaySandbox status. SendGrid sandbox mode may be enabled depending on configuration. Does NOT suppress sending.
rule: TestMode=true emails are still sent but marked as sandboxed

detail: Email2SmsWhitelistEntries(ProfileId, Email) — sender email must be present for the target profile. DuplicateEntryException thrown on duplicate insert. ProfileNotFoundException if profile missing.
rule: Email2SMS requires whitelist entry per profile

detail: EmailMessage.BccEmails is a single NVARCHAR(500) field with semicolon-separated addresses. UseBcc controls whether BCC is applied.
EmailCategoryEnum must be set: SupportMails(1), BulkEmails(2), PasswordMails(3), BroadcastReceiptMails(5), etc. Used for SendGrid category tagging and statistics.
Table of blacklisted domains. Checked before saving EmailMessage — validation error if recipient email domain is in list.

RULE[wiki:Blob-storage]: SendGrid error responses written to 'errorlogs' Azure Blob container. Container holds raw HTTP response from SendGrid on failure. Used for debugging delivery failures.

RULE[wiki:Background-services]: Email delivery is SPLIT into two background services: (1) EmailBackgroundService: SmsLog → EmailMessage conversion + queueing. (2) SendGridBackgroundService: EmailMessage → SendGrid API send. This split enables system emails (password reset, notifications) to be sent WITHOUT a SmsLogId by queuing directly as EmailMessage.
RULE[wiki:Broadcast-delivery-flow]: Email is one of 5 broadcast delivery channels: SMS (GatewayAPI bulk FTP or single API), Email (SendGrid), Voice (Infobip), Web messages, InfoPortal.
RULE[wiki:Domain-Description/Customers.md]: CustomerAccount is a child entity of Customer — likely used for email/billing account context.
